_comment: Default toolchain selection installed by `luban-boot setup`. To opt out of one, set `enabled` to false. To pin a different upstream, drop a same-named JSON into <data>/registry/overlay/.

components.name: llvm-mingw
components._why: clang/clangd/lld/libc++/MinGW runtime in one userland zip — replaces MSVC for the no-UAC default path

components.name: ninja
components._why: required generator — Visual Studio generators do not produce compile_commands.json

components.name: mingit
components._why: needed by vcpkg and as a general dev tool

extras.name: vcpkg
extras._why: C++ project deps. Overlay manifest at manifests_seed/vcpkg.json bypasses Scoop's installer.script; component.cpp runs bootstrap-vcpkg.bat once after extract.
